name: AMP Golf
address: 8 NE Skyline Dr, Lee's Summit, MO 64086
about: AMP Golf is a 24/7 Golf Performance Lab in Lees Summit, MO, offering a comprehensive training environment with indoor simulators, a functional gym, and PGA instruction. The facility features 3 Foresight Falcon Golf Simulators and a regulation putting green, providing year-round practice capabilities regardless of weather. AMP is designed for golfers seeking structured improvement through technology, coaching, and fitness programs, with a membership model that combines access to simulators and gym facilities. The venue emphasizes a serious, results-oriented approach to golf training, offering personalized practice plans and performance-based coaching.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to premium simulator technology and gym facilities
Personalized coaching and data-driven improvement plans
Ability to play 18 holes in under 45 minutes
Surrounded by a community of like-minded golfers focused on improvement
Comprehensive golf-fitness programs with TPI assessments

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) allowed for members

simulator_hardware.notes: 3 overhead camera simulator bays with real-time ball and club data tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own clubs for use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is allowed for members. No food service is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes at AMP Golf takes approximately 45 minutes compared to 4+ hours on an outdoor course.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding child-friendly amenities or policies mentioned on the website.
